summary: Frontend testing of multi-language support fix. All 7 languages (EN, ES, FR, PT, DE, IT, ZH) now available on both Landing page and Dashboard. Language switching works correctly and UI text updates appropriately.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-language support fully working. All 7 languages available on Landing page (header) and Dashboard (sidebar footer). Language switching updates UI text correctly.

details: LanguageSelector component visible in header (compact variant)
Dropdown opens when clicking flag/chevron button
All 7 languages displayed: EN, ES, FR, PT, DE, IT, ZH
Each language shows flag, native name, and English name
data-testid attributes present for all options
LanguageSelector component visible in sidebar footer
Dropdown opens upward (bottom-full) to avoid clipping
All 7 languages displayed: EN, ES, FR, PT, DE, IT, ZH
z-index 9999 ensures dropdown appears above other elements

elements_translated: Stats labels (Total Classes, Total Students, etc.)
Section headers (Attendance Pending, Quick Actions, etc.)

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Landing page only had English/Spanish toggle, Dashboard only had English
fix_details: Landing page now uses full LanguageSelector component with all 7 languages
Dashboard sidebar has LanguageSelector with all 7 languages
Both use compact variant with flag display
stopPropagation/preventDefault added to prevent navigation issues

screenshots_taken: landing_initial.png - Landing page with language selector visible
